items.raw_desc: Switch TP-Link SG5428X, Omada:A network switch is a functional network unit that connects individual devices or other network elements. It is designed for coordinating network traffic. The TP-Link SG5428X, Omada SDN is supposed to be placed in a rack. The model has a switching capacity of 128 Gb/s. The Switch has 24 × RJ-45 ports that facilitate connection with network elements. 10/100/1000Base-T technology facilitates data transfer with a speed of up to 1000 Mbit/s. The switch dimensions are 440 × 180 × 44mm. QoS aka Quality of Service technology makes sure the switch stays within its capacity,  and it also enables you to set up end station priority. The weight of the switch is 2060g. The TP-Link SG5428X, Omada SDN also operates on the ISO/OSI model network layer,  meaning it can double as a router. Thanks to this useful function,  you won't need another network element.
